titleStmt.title: SII 39.46: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 46. (A.R. No. 46 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL (INSIDE)

summary.p: This inscription registers a grant made by the merchants (nagarattār) residing in the street called Sundarapāṇḍyaṉ perunderu at Tirukkōlakkuḍi in Puṟamalaināḍu a hamlet Sundaraśolapuram alias Dēsiyugandapaṭṭinam in Tenkōnāḍu, a sub-division of Ollaiyūrkūṟṟam in Kaḍaladaiyādilaṅgaikoṇḍa chōḻavaḷanāḍu, for which they had the privilege of receiving the tīrtha and sacred ashes in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī puṟamalaināṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi Āṇṭa na
yinār koyilil mutaliyār tiruvācikaiy karaviṭa
m puṟam piṭam nācciyār Āka yivarkaḷ maṟṟum kaṭala
ṭaiyātilaṅkai koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ol
laiyūrk kūṟṟattu tenko nāṭṭu cuntaracoḻapuramāṉa
teci Ukantapaṭṭaṇattu puṟamalaināṭṭu tirukkoḷa
kkuṭiyil cuntirapāṇṭiyan perunteruvil nakara
ttār māttūruṭaiyān mātaiyār Āṇṭār U
ṭaiyārum pāmaṭai Ūruṭaiyān Upappāṇṭār
mutaliyāṉa kanṉimalaik keḻvataṟaiyaṉum tiru koḷak
kuṭi ntārum tirukkaivel
laḻakiyārum tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyār Āki cai
tta poyi cella
ru kamaice Inakarattu ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārā
ṉa nallā Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyār vaṇkā
ṭāntārum nallā Uṭaiyārāṉa tāṭṭi
yarum Anpan tillaiyuḷḷāṭuvārum ti
ru taccamaḻakiyār Ā raṉ cuntara
pāṇṭiye cakkiṟavaṟti Uḷḷiṭṭārum Āka Ivar
kaḷ taṉmam § Ivakaḻukku taṅkaḷ kaṭa kattukkuti
ttam tirunīṟum Oṭukkum peṟṟu pokakkaṭa
varkakaḷākavum tirunāḷukku Ēḻāntirunā
matittu tiruccāntum
cuntara coḻapuram Uḷḷiṭṭa nālu nakaramum
tiruccāntu cātti muṭintu varikku paṇam poṉṉilu
ṉmā kuṭukka kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Innakarattukku
tittam tiruniṟum peṟṟu po �rkaḷ
ḷākavum Ippaṭikku
Ālāla cuntarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ci
piramātarāyar Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
